name: Phosphor Icons
description: Flexible open-source icon family with 1200+ icons in six weight variants (thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone). Available for web, React, Vue, Flutter, and as a Figma library.

seo.title: Phosphor Icons — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Phosphor Icons: Flexible open-source icon family with 1200+ icons in six weight variants (thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone). Available for web, React,

when_to_use: Icon weight variant switched from regular to bold for dark mode
React package tree-shaken to include only icons in use
Duotone icon variant used for premium feature visual indicator
Flutter icon package integrated into cross-platform mobile app
Figma icon library synced to code via Phosphor Figma plugin

pros: 1200+ icons across six weights including duotone and fill
Available for web, React, Vue, Flutter, and Figma
Weight variants let you match brand voice precisely
cons: Larger catalog than needed for simple UIs
Visual style less minimal than Feather or Lucide
Multiple weights balloon bundle size if misused
Some icons feel redundant across weights
review.verdict: The most versatile free icon family when you need weight variation; a strong Lucide alternative for expressive brands.
review.best_for: Brands wanting expressive weight variation across web, mobile, and Flutter products.
review.not_for: Ultra-minimal UIs or projects where single-weight consistency is the goal.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

lock_in.reason: open source icon library, free to use
